description: S3 Standard-tier storage bill doubles after a security log pipeline starts writing 12 TB/month of compliance logs without lifecycle policies moving them to Glacier.

root_cause.summary: Security compliance log pipeline writes to S3 Standard with no lifecycle rule. Logs are read once then never again but accrue Standard pricing indefinitely.
root_cause.remediation: Add a lifecycle rule: transition to Standard-IA at 30 days, Glacier Instant Retrieval at 90 days, Deep Archive at 365 days. ~70% cost reduction on old logs.
